name: Kinjiro Co.,Ltd.
summary: Nittsu System Co., Ltd. provides human resource management solutions. The company develops package software, including employment, HR, payroll, healthcare, and labor cost management system solutions. It also offers hardware, such as Linux-equipped time clock/working terminals and time correction devices. In addition, the company offers support services comprising operational consulting, system introduction, and post-installation support; undertakes time clock/working terminal installation, LAN wiring, and electrical facility construction works; and TV conference/rental conference room services. Nittsu System Co., Ltd. was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
